title: prf
text: prf Set the TCP/IP version preference to TCP4 (IPv4) or TCP6 (IPv6). USYS$TCP_PARAMS { = } prf = 4 | 6 Use This option can be set in all assignment files. Description When there is a choice in your TCP environment, use this parameter to specify your preference for the TCP protocol version. If there is no choice, for example, if your TCP supports only TCP4 or only TCP6, then your specified preference is ignored. If not present, TCP4 is the default. Related Links Host Identification for TCP/IP and TLS The TCP and TLS connectors support both the TCP4 (IPv4) and TCP6 (IPv6) protocols. The protocol used depends on the format of the IP address of the host, and how it is specified. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
